resumeText:
James Porter | Software Developer | jporter@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/jamesporter

SUMMARY
Software developer with 3 years of experience in web development. Comfortable with React and Node.js. Looking for opportunities to grow as a developer.

EXPERIENCE
Software Developer — TechCorp Solutions (2021–Present)
- Developed new features for client-facing web application using React and Redux
- Participated in code reviews and fixed bugs reported by QA team
- Wrote unit tests for frontend components, achieving 60% coverage on assigned modules
- Collaborated with backend team to integrate REST APIs

Junior Developer — StartupXYZ (2020–2021)
- Built internal admin dashboard using Vue.js and Express
- Migrated 15 pages from legacy jQuery codebase to React

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — State University (2020)

SKILLS
JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Redux, Node.js, Express, SQL, Git, HTML/CSS

PROJECTS
- Personal blog built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel
- Todo app with user authentication using Firebase

Megan Flores | QA Engineer | megan.flores@email.com

SUMMARY
QA Engineer with 2 years of experience in manual and automated testing. Familiar with Selenium and Postman. Detail-oriented and committed to software quality.

EXPERIENCE
QA Engineer — Medtech Inc. (2022–Present)
- Wrote and executed 300+ manual test cases for web and mobile applications
- Automated 40 regression tests using Selenium WebDriver and TestNG, reducing regression run time by 35%
- Identified and logged 180+ bugs in Jira; worked with developers to prioritize critical defects
- Participated in sprint planning and contributed acceptance criteria for user stories

QA Intern — SoftDev Agency (2022)
- Performed exploratory testing on 3 client projects
- Created test plans and documented test results in Confluence

EDUCATION
B.S. Information Technology — Community College Transfer to State University (2022)

SKILLS
Manual Testing, Selenium, Postman, Jira, TestNG, SQL, Git | Some Python scripting knowledge

NOTES
Experience is primarily manual testing; limited CI/CD and performance testing exposure

Aisha Thompson | Data Analyst | aisha.t@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aishathompson

SUMMARY
Junior data analyst with 1 year of professional experience and a statistics degree. Proficient in Excel and basic SQL. Learning Python and Tableau.

EXPERIENCE
Data Analyst — RetailCo (2023–Present)
- Created weekly sales dashboards in Excel used by the regional sales team
- Wrote SQL queries to extract data from the company's PostgreSQL database for monthly reports
- Identified a data entry error affecting 5% of transactions and worked with ops team to correct records
- Assisted senior analysts with ad hoc analysis requests

Intern — City Government Analytics Office (2022)
- Cleaned and formatted datasets for public-facing reports
- Prepared visualizations in Tableau for two community engagement presentations

EDUCATION
B.S. Statistics — State University (2022)

SKILLS
Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP), SQL (basic-intermediate), Tableau (beginner), Python (self-learning: pandas, matplotlib), Google Sheets

LIMITATIONS
No machine learning experience. Limited big data tools exposure (no Spark/Hadoop). Tableau experience is entry-level.

Tyler Nguyen | Frontend Developer | tyler.nguyen@email.com | github.com/tylernguyen

SUMMARY
Frontend developer with 3 years building user interfaces for web apps. Solid React skills. Looking for a team that values clean UI and good UX.

EXPERIENCE
Frontend Developer — Digital Agency Co. (2021–Present)
- Built and maintained 8 client websites using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS
- Improved Lighthouse performance score from 61 to 84 on e-commerce client's homepage
- Collaborated with 2 UX designers to translate wireframes into pixel-perfect components
- Responded to and resolved client-reported UI bugs within agreed SLA (95% within 48 hours)

Frontend Intern — Creative Web Studio (2021)
- Created responsive landing pages for 5 marketing campaigns
- Converted 12 Figma designs into HTML/CSS/JS pages

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — Regional University (2021)

SKILLS
React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Git, Figma

SKILLS GAPS
Limited backend experience (no API development). No testing framework experience beyond manual testing. No CI/CD knowledge.

Chris Dolan | Software Developer | chrisdolan@email.com

SUMMARY
Career changer with a marketing background and 6 months of development experience post-bootcamp. Completed a 12-week full-stack web development bootcamp. Motivated learner building real-world projects.

EXPERIENCE
Junior Developer — SmallBiz App (2023–Present, Part-time/Contract)
- Added contact form and Google Maps integration to local business website
- Fixed CSS styling bugs reported by business owner
- Maintained WordPress content on 2 client sites

Marketing Coordinator — AdAgency (2018–2023)
- Managed social media accounts with 50K combined followers
- Coordinated 30+ marketing campaigns; tracked ROI in Google Analytics
- Led email marketing with 22% average open rate across 80K subscriber list

EDUCATION
Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp — Coding Academy (2023, 12 weeks)
B.A. Marketing — State College (2018)

SKILLS
HTML, CSS, JavaScript (basic), React (basic), Node.js (basic), Git, WordPress

PROJECTS
- Portfolio site built with React
- To-do list app with local storage
- Basic weather API app using OpenWeatherMap

Sam Rivera | Full-Stack Developer | sam.rivera@email.com | github.com/samrivera

SUMMARY
Recent bootcamp graduate with 1 year of professional experience. Passionate about building web applications. Strong fundamentals in JavaScript and Python.

EXPERIENCE
Junior Full-Stack Developer — SaaS Startup (2023–Present)
- Contributed features to Node.js/React codebase under senior developer supervision
- Fixed 25 bugs from backlog over 6 months
- Wrote integration tests for 3 new API endpoints
- Participated in daily standups and sprint retrospectives

EDUCATION
Full-Stack Development Bootcamp — Dev Academy (2022, 6 months)
B.A. English — Liberal Arts College (2019)

SKILLS
JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Git, REST APIs

PROJECTS
- E-commerce prototype: React frontend with Node.js backend and Stripe integration
- Chat app: Socket.io real-time messaging with user authentication
- Recipe finder: React app using Spoonacular API

NOTES
Limited production system experience. No cloud platform experience. TypeScript learning in progress.

Nina Patel | DevOps Engineer | nina.patel@email.com | linkedin.com/in/ninapatel-devops

SUMMARY
Mid-level DevOps engineer with 2 years of experience. Familiar with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and AWS basics. AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner.

EXPERIENCE
DevOps Engineer — FinTech Startup (2022–Present)
- Maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions for 8 microservices
- Containerized 5 legacy applications using Docker, reducing environment inconsistencies
- Monitored infrastructure with CloudWatch; set up basic alerting for 3 production services
- Assisted in Kubernetes migration of 2 services (under senior engineer guidance)

IT Operations Intern — Insurance Corp (2021–2022)
- Managed on-premise server patching schedule for 40 Windows servers
- Documented deployment runbooks for 6 internal applications

EDUCATION
B.S. Network Engineering — Technical University (2021)

SKILLS
Docker, Kubernetes (basic), Jenkins, GitHub Actions, AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch), Linux, Bash scripting, Terraform (beginner)

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner

SKILLS GAPS
No Helm or GitOps experience. Limited Kubernetes production experience. No security certifications.

Ben Osei | Junior Mobile Developer | ben.osei@email.com | github.com/benosei

SUMMARY
Junior mobile developer with 1 year of experience building iOS apps with Swift. Recently completed Apple's SwiftUI certification. Eager to contribute to a strong mobile team.

EXPERIENCE
Junior iOS Developer — AppDev Studio (2023–Present)
- Implemented 4 new screens in SwiftUI for a fitness tracking app
- Fixed 18 UI bugs from QA backlog
- Integrated HealthKit API for step tracking and calorie logging features
- Participated in bi-weekly code reviews; addressed all reviewer feedback

Mobile App Intern — University Innovation Lab (2022)
- Built a campus map iOS app as part of a 3-person intern team
- Presented app to university administration; adopted as official campus tool

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — University of Ghana / Exchange Year at UC Davis (2023)

SKILLS
Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit (basic), HealthKit, CocoaPods, Git, REST APIs, Xcode

PROJECTS
- Weather app with location services and animated transitions
- Expense tracker with Core Data persistence

CERTIFICATIONS
Apple SwiftUI Essentials Certificate

SKILLS GAPS
No Android/Kotlin experience. No App Store shipping experience with production apps. No testing framework experience.
